caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene is set in a conference room with several committee members seated around a long table, attentively listening and taking notes. The participants appear engaged, with some leaning forward, indicating active participation in the discussion. The room is equipped with various items such as water bottles, documents, and electronic devices, suggesting a well-prepared and structured meeting environment. The atmosphere conveys a sense of seriousness and professionalism as the committee deliberates on the important issue at hand.
